title: scrophularia flava
intro: Scrophularia flava, also known as Yellow Figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia flava include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root infusions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
